title: User Guides Screen — Verify Falcon Charge Stand is NOT listed as a sub-device
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap the Home tab (bottom navigation).
Verify the Falcon Charge Stand is NOT listed as a connected device on the Home screen.
Tap the Menu icon (three horizontal lines) in the top-left corner.
Tap 'User Guides' from the navigation drawer menu.
Observe the list of devices displayed on the User Guides screen.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' does NOT appear anywhere in the device list.
Verify that only valid headset or speakerphone products are listed (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC, Poly Voyager 5200, etc.).
expected: The Falcon Charge Stand is NOT displayed on the User Guides screen. Only valid headset/speakerphone products appear in the device list.

title: User Guides Screen — Verify device list matches only connected/pairing-capable devices
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Navigate to Home screen and confirm a Poly headset (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC) is connected.
Tap Menu icon → 'User Guides'.
Take note of all device names listed on the User Guides screen.
Disconnect the current headset via Bluetooth settings on the phone.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home screen.
Tap Menu icon → 'User Guides' again.
Observe the device list.
expected: The User Guides screen lists only actual headset/speakerphone products. Charging accessories like Falcon Charge Stand are never listed. When no device is connected, the list may show supported products but never charging accessories.

title: User Guides Screen — Verify content after navigating from Home screen with Falcon Charge Stand connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Connect a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC headset to the phone via Bluetooth.
Place the earbuds in the Falcon Charge Stand (charge case) and ensure the charge case is powered on.
On the Home screen, verify the connected device shows as 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' (not the charge stand).
Tap Menu icon → 'User Guides'.
Observe the full list of devices/guides shown.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' or 'Charge Stand' or any variant does NOT appear.
Verify that 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' IS listed as a device with a user guide.
expected: The User Guides screen correctly shows 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' as a device with a user guide. The Falcon Charge Stand is NOT listed as a sub-device or separate entry.

title: User Guides Screen — Verify no charging accessories appear after app restart
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Connect a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC headset.
Place earbuds in the Falcon Charge Stand (charge case) and ensure it is charging.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides and verify the list.
Force-close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from recent apps).
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Home screen and confirm the device is still connected.
Tap Menu icon → 'User Guides'.
Observe the device list.
expected: After app restart, the User Guides screen still correctly lists only the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC headset. The Falcon Charge Stand is NOT listed as a sub-device or separate entry.

title: User Guides Screen — Verify filtering logic excludes accessories when multiple Poly devices are connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Connect a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC headset via Bluetooth.
Connect a second Poly device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) via Bluetooth.
Place the Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds in the Falcon Charge Stand.
Navigate to Home screen and verify both headsets appear as connected devices.
Tap Menu icon → 'User Guides'.
Observe the list of devices shown.
Verify that both 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' and 'Poly Voyager 5200' are listed.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' is NOT listed.
expected: Both connected headsets appear on the User Guides screen. The Falcon Charge Stand is correctly excluded from the device list despite being physically connected to the earbuds.

title: User Guides Screen — Verify no stale/phantom entries for accessories after device disconnection
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Connect a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC headset.
Place earbuds in Falcon Charge Stand.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides and verify only the headset is listed.
Disconnect the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC from Bluetooth settings.
Return to Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Home screen — verify no device is shown as connected.
Tap Menu icon → 'User Guides'.
Observe the device list.
expected: After disconnecting the headset, the User Guides screen does NOT show any stale entries for the Falcon Charge Stand or any other accessory. The list either shows no devices or only supported products without the charge stand.
